sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1132" key="a)dai=os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδαῖος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄδην</foreign> <sense id="n1132.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing surfeit</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
